body:
Nexus has 3 server tiers. Corporate servers on the surface,
internal servers in the middle, and mainframes deep down.
Government servers are protected by military-grade encryption.
Use DECRYPT to decrypt keys. Each key requires
computing power. Upgrade CPU with UPGRADE.
I left weak passwords scattered around. Try LOGIN with:
  "admin123" on port 999
  "letmein" on port 25
  "root!" on port 21
Passwords are the weakest link in every system.
